notes: Core mechanics work well including shields with pixel damage, alien waves, UFO, and lives system, but alien sprites are rough approximations rather than authentic pixel art, and the firing mechanic has a minor quirk where Space key state management can occasionally prevent shooting.

An exceptionally well-made implementation with procedural pixel-art aliens, pixel-perfect destructible shields, and complete game loop, though it suffers slightly from frame-dependent movement speeds and unoptimized shield rendering (drawing thousands of 1x1 rects per frame).
A solid and mostly complete Space Invaders clone, but it has noticeable authenticity and gameplay-balance shortcomings that keep it well below a top score.
